title: Collaborate with others with Markdown and GitHub Pages
summary: Learn how to use Markdown to effectively communicate with others in your GitHub issues, pull requests, comments, and documentation. Then learn how to build project sites and blog posts to promote your projects with GitHub Pages.

sections.title: Collaborate with others with Markdown and GitHub Pages
sections.summary: Learn how to use Markdown to effectively communicate with others in your GitHub issues, pull requests, comments, and documentation. Then learn how to build project sites and blog posts to promote your projects with GitHub Pages.

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use key GitHub features, including issues, notifications, branches, commits, and pull requests.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Communicate effectively on GitHub using Markdown
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use Markdown to communicate with brevity, clarity, and expression.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/communicate-using-markdown/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Communicate effectively on GitHub using Markdown

lessons.title: Create and host web sites by using GitHub Pages
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to host your personal, organization, and project sites for free with GitHub Pages.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-host-web-sites-github-pages/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create and host web sites by using GitHub Pages

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Collaborate with others with Markdown and GitHub Pages
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Collaborate with others with Markdown and GitHub Pages**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
